news.summary: Houston-based Emerald Storage Holdings LLC, the owner of Enstor Gas and its subsidiary Mississippi Hub, revealed that the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) has given the green light to their Mississippi Hub Expansion Project. This move comes after Enstor made a final investment decision (FID) and officially accepted the certificate from FERC. The FERC order, dated March 20, 2025, not only approved the project but also confirmed Mississippi Hub’s authorization to proceed with the expansion.
news.headline: Enstor Gas receives FERC approval to expand Mississippi Hub gas storage facility, reaches FID, accepting certificate.

news.summary: In Oman, Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) and Nabors Industries (NYSE: NBR) successfully conducted the initial fully automated surface and subsurface rotary and slide drilling operations. Through the merger of their digital technologies, the companies facilitated the implementation of closed-loop drilling procedures on land, enhancing operational effectiveness, uniformity, and the ability to make real-time decisions. Halliburton's LOGIX™ automation and remote operations systems, along with Nabors' SmartROS® rig operating technology, played a vital role in this achievement.
news.headline: Halliburton and Nabors automate drilling operations in Oman, achieving first fully automated execution in Middle East.

news.summary: On Tuesday, Dow Jones futures experienced a decline as investors awaited important economic data. Bank of America saw a significant increase in its stock market performance due to strong earnings results. This news highlights the cautious market sentiment leading up to the release of key data.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures drop before crucial data; Bank of America surges with strong earnings; investor uncertainty persists.

news.summary: Located in Tampa, Florida, Inlayer is a leading network device management platform that integrates cutting-edge automation, AI technology, strong APIs, and security measures. The company recently revealed remarkable growth, attributed to successful channel partnerships. This success was marked by record-breaking figures in terms of sales and expansion. Inlayer's emphasis on collaboration and innovation has proven to be a winning strategy as indicated by the significant increase in revenue and market presence.
news.headline: Inlayer, a network device management platform, sees record growth due to strategic partnerships.

news.summary: A mergers and acquisitions advisory firm, sbLiftOff, which specializes in serving government contracting and founder-led businesses, has recently expanded its services in the IT services and software sector. The firm made this announcement on April 15, 2025. Two senior dealmakers have joined the team, renowned for their expertise in M&A. This strategic move highlights the firm's commitment to enhancing its offerings in this industry.
news.headline: sbLiftOff adds Shaunna Balady and Kelly Kunkle as Senior SMEs, expanding M&A in IT services and software.

news.summary: A poetry contest held by Winning Writers has released the results of its 22nd annual Tom Howard/Margaret Reid Poetry Contest. The judging panel, led by Michal 'MJ' Jones and supported by Briana Grogan and Dare Williams, declared D.T. Christensen of Stow, Massachusetts as the winner. This year's competition drew in a record number of entries with over 2,500 poets participating to showcase their talents.
news.headline: Winning Writers announces winners of 22nd Annual Tom Howard/Margaret Reid Poetry Contest judged by Michal Jones; D.T. Christensen wins.

news.summary: Cutting-edge Science for Tangible Outcomes! Based in State College, Pennsylvania, on April 15, 2025, CannabisCollegeofAmerica.com revealed the introduction of its digital cannabis learning hub. The platform will be inaugurated on April 20, 2025, with classes kick-starting on April 22. The establishment...
news.headline: Cannabis College of America launches online programs on April 20, 2025, with first classes on April 22, preparing cannabis experts.

news.summary: The Louisville Business First program "Business Women First" recognized the notable contributions made by business and civic leaders to the Louisville community. The event celebrated Tammy Taylor, Chief Executive Officer of Advantum Health, a prominent practice revenue company. This recognition was part of the program's efforts to highlight influential women in business. The program held in Louisville, Kentucky on April 15, 2025, brought attention to the achievements and impact of these leaders. This initiative showcases the vital role played by women in shaping the business landscape in the region. Through their dedication and success, these women contribute significantly to the growth and prosperity of the Louisville community.
news.headline: Tammy Taylor, CEO of Advantum Health, recognized as 2025 Enterprising Women Honoree by Louisville Business First.

news.summary: In Nazareth, Pennsylvania, as of April 15, 2025, Clapton's Choice Signature Strings have been providing the iconic sound that Eric Clapton relies on for over twenty years. To commemorate this achievement, Martin Guitar is launching a special limited-edition release for the 20th anniversary.
news.headline: Martin Guitar celebrates 20 years of Clapton's Choice Strings with limited-edition packaging and contest.

news.summary: Cyabra has finalized a business merger deal with Trailblazer Merger Corp., known as TBMC. The agreement will see Cyabra merging with TBMC for an undisclosed amount. This strategic move aims to enhance market presence and growth opportunities for both companies.
news.headline: Cyabra reports record 2024 financial performance, doubling revenue and strengthening gross margins, while merging with TBMC.

news.summary: AB INTL GROUP recently disclosed its financial results for the period ending February 28, 2025. The report highlighted the company's consistent achievement in net profitability. This positive outcome reflects the success of AB INTL GROUP, with notable numbers indicating a strong financial performance. The specifics of the financial results and net profitability demonstrate significant progress and stability within the company during the mentioned period.
news.headline: AB INTL GROUP reported financial results for period ending Feb 28, 2025, with consistent net profitability.

news.summary: The stock of Boeing has seen a decline following reports indicating that China plans to cease placing orders from the Dow Jones manufacturer in retaliation to President Trump's tariffs. This development has led to a drop in Boeing's stock value as investors react to the uncertainties surrounding trade tensions between the U.S. and China. The company is anticipated to face challenges ahead as it navigates through the repercussions of this trade war escalation. The impact of this decision can be significant as China is one of Boeing's major customers, with a substantial number of orders coming from the country.
news.headline: Boeing stock drops due to China's retaliation in trade war over President Trump's tariffs, halting orders.

news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on April 15, 2025, Norsemont Mining Inc. revealed an enhanced Mineral Resource Estimate (MRE) showing 2,184,000 indicated gold equivalent ounces and 557,000 inferred gold equivalent ounces. The Company is listed as CSE: NOM, OTCQB: NRRSF, FWB: LXZ1.
news.headline: Norsemont announces 2,184,000 indicated gold eq. ounces and 557,000 inferred gold eq. ounces for Choquelimpie.

news.summary: Gamers have the opportunity to access special gaming rewards and Salted Caramel Butterfinger merchandise before the release of Borderlands 4 in September. This partnership between Butterfinger®, the beloved peanut-buttery bar, and the upcoming game will offer exclusive prizes. The collaboration begins in Parsippany, N.J., on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: Butterfinger partners with 'Borderlands 4' for sweepstakes with exclusive gaming prizes & merchandise. Launch in September.

news.summary: A unique exhibit at the New York International Auto Show highlights an impressive collection of vintage, classic, and iconic cars, covering more than 100 years of automotive history. This special showcase is part of the event's 125th-anniversary celebration.
news.headline: New York Auto Show marks 125th anniversary with exhibit featuring vintage, classic, and iconic cars spanning over a century.

news.summary: On April 17, a new Pizookie® variant will be introduced to customers, featuring a unique mix of melted cheddar and tender broccoli in the cookie base, topped with two scoops of mashed potatoes. This innovative dish will be available at BJ's in Huntington Beach, California. The launch comes as part of the restaurant's ongoing efforts to tantalize taste buds with creative combinations.
news.headline: BJ's Restaurant & Brewhouse introduces a Broccoli Cheddar Pizookie®, launching on April 17 with 2 scoops of mashed potatoes.

news.summary: TOP Ships Inc., based in Athens, Greece, disclosed on April 15, 2025, that it has officially submitted its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Recognized as a prominent entity trading on the NYSE under the symbol "TOPS," the Company specializes in managing innovative, environmentally friendly "ECO" tanker ships. Interested parties can obtain the detailed Annual Report directly from the Company's official site, www.topships.org, or access it via the Commission's website at www.sec.gov.
news.headline: TOP Ships Inc. files 2024 annual report on Form 20-F, accessible online; based in Athens, specializes in "ECO" tankers.

news.summary: An examination of blood samples from participants administered with Aramchol in the ARMOR Phase 3 MASH Study has yielded significant findings regarding the drug's biochemical and physiological impacts. The analysis of pharmacodynamic markers connected with Aramchol administration indicated a notable reduction in certain indicators...
news.headline: New blood markers for Aramchol, a leading SCD1 inhibitor, revealed through ARMOR study with insights into drug effects.

news.summary: In a public sign-on letter dated April 15, 2025, the American Academy of Pediatric Dentistry (AAPD) was supported by 250 prominent health professional organizations and research bodies in Chicago.AAPD is known as the leading authority on children's oral health.
news.headline: AAPD and 250 organizations affirm safety of water fluoridation for oral health. - Chicago, April 15, 2025.

news.summary: In recent news, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to a record low of 3.7%, the lowest it has been in nearly 50 years. This decrease in unemployment reflects a strong economy and job market, with employers adding over 134,000 jobs in various sectors. Additionally, the average hourly earnings for workers have increased by 2.8% over the past year, showing steady growth in wages. These positive economic indicators are contributing to increased consumer confidence and spending.
news.headline: Helport AI unveils upgraded AI software to streamline consumer financing operations, boosting efficiency by 30%.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, in Boston, SimSpace, a top company in cyber readiness and security optimization, revealed the selection of Michael Bayer to its Board of Directors. Michael brings valuable skills in finance, operations, technology, and business development to the team. This move signifies SimSpace's commitment to enhancing its corporate governance and leveraging Michael's extensive experience in various key areas.
news.headline: SimSpace names Michael Bayer to Board of Directors on April 15, 2025, reinforcing cyber security leadership.

news.summary: A recently launched AI assistant is now aiding designers by providing detailed guidance and suggestions throughout the design process. The Onshape Government division has introduced cloud-based CAD and PDM solutions specifically tailored for aerospace and defense corporations, ensuring compliance with ITAR and EAR regulations. This update was announced in Boston on April 15, 2025 by PTC, a company listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange.
news.headline: PTC launches Onshape AI Advisor for designers and Onshape Government for aerospace firms. - 132 characters

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, TNL Mediagene (Nasdaq: TNMG), a digital media and data group based in Asia, revealed a strategic alliance with PChome Online, a prominent e-commerce brand in Taiwan (Stock Code: 8044-TW). This partnership signifies a significant milestone in the industry, bringing together two influential companies to expand their market reach and enhance online services.
news.headline: TNL Mediagene (Nasdaq: TNMG) partners with PChome Online (Stock Code: 8044-TW) to reshape Taiwan's retail media landscape.

news.summary: In Baltimore on April 15, 2025, Under Armour, Inc. disclosed that three new members will be joining its Board of Directors, effective immediately. Dawn N. Fitzpatrick, Eugene D. Smith, and Robert J. Sweeney are the latest additions to the board. Dawn and Rob bring with them a wealth of financial and operational knowledge that will contribute significantly to the company's strategic direction. Under Armour, listed as UA and UAA on the NYSE, continues to strengthen its leadership with these key appointments.
news.headline: Under Armour adds Dawn N. Fitzpatrick, Eugene D. Smith, and Robert J. Sweeney to its board of directors on April 15, 2025.

news.summary: In Herndon, Virginia on April 15, 2025, Triple Canopy, a subsidiary of Constellis, secured a task order worth $95 million. The order involves supplying Protective Security Officers, supervisors, and management services at the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) Headquarters located in Silver Spring, Maryland.
news.headline: Constellis subsidiary Triple Canopy secures $95M contract to provide security services at FDA Headquarters.

news.summary: This information cannot be distributed in the United States or to U.S. newswire services. On April 15, 2025, Innocan Pharma Corporation (CSE: INNO, FSE: IP4, OTCQB: INNPF) from Herzliya, Israel and Calgary, AB, is excited to report the successful completion of its recent transaction...
news.headline: Innocan Pharma completes private placement, CSE: INNO, FSE: IP4, OTCQB: INNPF. No US distribution.

news.summary: Cutting-edge technology is revolutionizing the industry by breaking down barriers between different identity solutions for publishers and the buyside. This advancement enables seamless interoperability on a large scale, encompassing internet service providers (ISP) and third-party data sets. By ensuring consistency and precision in audience targeting, this breakthrough is transforming streaming and cross-platform campaigns. This innovation is poised to enhance the effectiveness of advertising strategies and drive significant improvements in reaching target audiences.
news.headline: OpenAP introduces Open Identity to bridge gaps between publisher/buyside identities, ISPs, and third-party data sets, for better audience targeting across streaming & cross-platform campaigns.

news.summary: A prominent international shipping company has implemented a comprehensive suite of Billing, Collections, Revenue Recognition, and Portal solutions. This development was revealed by BillingPlatform, a leading enterprise platform for managing revenue lifecycles in modern business models, on April 15th, 2025. The company in question, Auctane®, will now benefit from streamlined financial processes with this implementation.
news.headline: Auctane integrates BillingPlatform for revenue management tools across products. DENVER, April 15, 2025.

news.summary: First Services offers a comprehensive range of fleet solutions to assist school districts, including predictive analytics, asset management, electrification routing, technology services, and driver training. On April 15, 2025, in Cincinnati, the leading student transportation provider, First Student, announced this support.
news.headline: First Student chosen by Fort Worth ISD for fleet maintenance; offers predictive analytics, asset management, electrification routing, and driver training.

news.summary: Recently, a study conducted by Upgraded Points in Austin, Texas, on April 15, 2025, found that couples looking for a memorable honeymoon can opt for domestic travel without breaking the bank. The study assessed various U.S. cities based on 15 key factors to determine the most ideal honeymoon destinations. This research sheds light on alternative options to expensive international travel, making it easier for couples to plan a romantic getaway without overspending.
news.headline: Study by Upgraded Points suggests top U.S. honeymoon towns don't need int'l travel or big savings. Research based on 15 factors.

news.summary: Super Dave Quinn, CEcD, founder of Day One Experts and a representative of Fairview Economic Development, was recognized for national leadership by the Industrial Asset Management Council (IAMC) at the IAMC Spring Forum in Sacramento on April 15, 2025. The event celebrated Quinn's contributions to the industry, showcasing his dedication and expertise. This prestigious honor highlights Quinn's exceptional work, emphasizing the importance of his role. The recognition at the forum signifies the significance of his leadership in the field. This acknowledgment underscores the impact of Quinn's efforts, advocating for economic growth and development. The recognition serves as a testament to Quinn's commitment to advancing industrial asset management. Super Dave Quinn's achievement at the IAMC Spring Forum showcases his outstanding leadership qualities, setting a benchmark for others in the industry, with attendees and industry professionals recognizing his excellence in this pivotal role.
news.headline: Super Dave Quinn of Day One Experts wins 2025 IAMC Economic Developer of the Year Award at Sacramento forum.

news.summary: Registration has commenced for the 2025 Insurance Investment Executives' Annual Meeting by InsuranceAUM.com, a leading platform in finance. The event will be held from July 16-17, 2025, at the prestigious University of Chicago's Booth School of Business. This gathering aims to bring together top executives in the insurance investment sector, known for managing significant assets and driving key financial decisions. Attendees will have the opportunity to engage with industry experts, network with peers, and gain valuable insights into the latest market trends.
news.headline: Registration open for 2025 Insurance Investment Executives' Annual Meeting on July 16-17 at University of Chicago. Hosted by InsuranceAUM.com.

news.summary: The Data Safety Monitoring Board (DSMB) that operates independently has suggested that the current study should move forward according to its original plan, after reviewing the safety data from participants in the low dosage group for the first 30 days.
news.headline: BioCardia's CardiALLO trial for heart failure gets positive review from DSMB, study to proceed as planned after 30-day safety assessment of low dosage group.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, a company called High Wire Networks, Inc. based in Batavia, introduced a new service called Risk-as-a-Service (RaaS) through its Overwatch cybersecurity division. High Wire Networks is known for its expertise in managed cybersecurity services and is listed on OTCQB under the ticker symbol HWNI. The RaaS service is aimed at assisting businesses in the ongoing detection, evaluation, and reduction of cybersecurity threats. This offering is designed to provide organizations with the tools and support needed to manage and address potential risks effectively.
news.headline: High Wire Networks launched Risk-as-a-Service (RaaS) to aid in cybersecurity, helping organizations manage risks proactively.

news.summary: KULR revealed a recent collaboration with German Bionic, a renowned global robotics firm recognized for its innovative robotic exoskeleton.
news.headline: KULR partners with German Bionic to bring AI-powered exoskeletons to US workforce, expanding into robotics market.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on April 15, 2025, Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE: IR), a prominent global provider of mission-critical flow creation, life science, and industrial solutions, disclosed their acquisition of G & D Chillers, Inc. ("G & D") and Advanced Gas Technologies Inc. ("AGT"). The combined purchase cost for both companies amounted to roughly $27 million. This strategic move aims to expand Ingersoll Rand's air treatment portfolio, solidifying its position in the market.
news.headline: Ingersoll Rand acquires G & D Chillers Inc. and Advanced Gas Technologies Inc. for $27 million to expand air treatment portfolio.

news.summary: Kennewick, Washington, April 15, 2025 - Vivos Inc. (OTCQB: RDGL) has announced advancements in its current human clinical trial in India for RadioGel ® Precision Radionuclide Therapy ™, an FDA-designated Breakthrough Device intended for solid tumor treatment. The recent findings showcase advancements in technology and increasing clinical validation, portraying significant progress in the trial.
news.headline: Vivos Inc. updates on India trial progress for RadioGel® Therapy, FDA Breakthrough Device, with positive results.

news.summary: More than 50% of dogs in the US are currently overweight or obese, putting them in a higher risk category for chronic illnesses, metabolic issues, and shorter lifespans.
news.headline: Vivani Medical and Okava team up to develop OKV-119 for dogs, targeting metabolic health. Over half of US dogs are overweight.

news.summary: A company based in Sugar Land, Texas, CVR Partners, LP, specializing in the production of ammonia and urea ammonium nitrate (UAN) solution fertilizers under the NYSE symbol UAN, is set to announce its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on Monday, April 28. The report will be made available following the market closure on the New York Stock Exchange. Additionally, the company will conduct a teleconference call the next day, Tuesday, April 29, at 11 a.m. Eastern Time, to provide insights and analysis on the quarter's results.
news.headline: CVR Partners (NYSE: UAN) to release Q1 2025 earnings on April 28 after NYSE close. Teleconference scheduled for April 29.

news.summary: A newfound collaborative effort with Experian is set to enhance audience targeting and boost revenue significantly across commerce media solutions. This strategic partnership aims to leverage Experian's expertise for sharper audience segmentation, leading to a more impactful revenue generation for commerce media platforms. The collaboration is expected to result in a substantial increase in revenue, with projections indicating a potential growth of X% in the coming months. This initiative marks a pivotal step towards maximizing the effectiveness of audience targeting strategies and ultimately driving higher returns on investment within the commerce media sector.
news.headline: Fluent, Inc. unveils enhanced identity graph with Experian for smarter personalization & targeting, boosting revenue impact.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, in Melville, New York, BioRestorative Therapies, Inc. (NASDAQ: BRTX), a company specializing in regenerative medicine and stem cell therapies, announced that their CEO, Lance Alstodt, will be featured in an interview on the Benzinga All-Access Show. The interview is scheduled for today at 10:50 a.m. Eastern Time. BioRestorative is a clinical stage innovator in the field and this interview aims to provide insights into their work and future prospects.
news.headline: BioRestorative set to discuss achievements in key milestones and commercial opportunities in Benzinga All-Access Show today. CEO to speak at 10:50 a.m. Eastern time.

news.summary: CVR Energy, Inc. (NYSE: CVI) headquartered in Sugar Land, Texas, has announced that it will unveil its first-quarter earnings report for 2025 on April 28 after the market closes on the New York Stock Exchange. Following this release, the company is scheduled to conduct a teleconference call on April 29 at 1 p.m. Eastern Time to deliberate on the financial results. This call will provide an opportunity for shareholders and analysts to gain insights and ask questions regarding CVR Energy, Inc.'s performance in Q1 2025.
news.headline: CVR Energy to announce Q1 2025 earnings on April 28th after NYSE close, with teleconference on April 29th at 1pm.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Constellium SE (NYSE: CSTM) disclosed the availability of important documents for its upcoming Annual General Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting is scheduled for May 15, 2025, at 5 PM CET (11 AM EDT). Shareholders can access the Proxy Statement and other relevant materials on the company's website at https://www.constellium.com/investors/shareholder-meetings. Additionally, these documents can be obtained free of charge by contacting the Corporate Secretary at cstm.corporatesecretary@constellium.com.
news.headline: Constellium SE announced Annual General Meeting on May 15, 2025. Proxy documents available online and in person.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, ESGold Corp. (CSE: ESAU | OTCQB: ESAUF | FSE: Z7D), a leading Canadian gold and silver producer, has announced key advancements as it progresses towards production at its Montauban Project in Quebec. The company shared recent milestones, exploration developments, and upcoming catalysts. ESGold is on track to becoming Canada's upcoming gold and silver producer, with the project having full permits in place. This update signifies the Company's commitment to growth and operational excellence in the industry.
news.headline: ESGold Corp. is advancing towards production and expanded exploration at Montauban project in Quebec, aiming to become Canada's next gold and silver producer.

news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, on April 15, 2025, EverQuote, Inc. (Nasdaq: EVER), a prominent online insurance marketplace, disclosed its plan to release first quarter financial results post-market closure on Monday, May 5, 2025. The management is set to conduct a conference call and webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day to delve into the company's financial performance, recent advancements, and future prospects.
news.headline: EverQuote (Nasdaq: EVER) to report Q1 2025 financial results on May 5, 2025, after market close. Conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.

news.summary: SoundThinking is enhancing public safety by incorporating PlateRanger into its SafetySmart platform, in addition to ShotSpotter and CrimeTracer. This integration will boost the investigative capabilities of law enforcement agencies by facilitating connected workflows.
news.headline: SoundThinking integrates PlateRanger into SafetySmart with ShotSpotter & CrimeTracer, enhancing capabilities for law enforcement.

news.summary: InterDigital, Inc., a technology research and development company specializing in mobile, video, and AI, disclosed that it will unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 1, 2025, prior to the market opening. The company, trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol IDCC, is based in Wilmington, Del. Stay tuned for key figures and insights from this impending release.
news.headline: InterDigital (Nasdaq: IDCC) to announce Q1 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025; release before market open.
Marimekko Corp's AGM and Board of Directors' meeting resolutions passed. Important decisions made.

news.summary: Dublin - A recent report added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings indicates that the construction market in Indonesia is projected to expand by 6.4% annually, reaching IDR 2,223,723.9 billion by 2025. The market in Indonesia demonstrated strong growth from 2020 to 2024, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 9.2%. This positive trend is anticipated to persist, driving further development in the industry.
news.headline: Indonesia construction industry to grow by 6.4% in 2025, reaching IDR 2,223,723.9 billion. CAGR of 9.2% (2020-2024).

news.summary: Apple Montessori, a well-known name in early childhood education since 1972, is expanding its reach with a total of 20 locations in New Jersey and plans for additional schools in the near future. The institution is committed to providing its advanced Montessori approach to new students, with growth and innovation at the forefront of its mission. The latest development in Westfield, N.J., marks another significant step in Apple Montessori's journey to make a difference in the education sector.
news.headline: Apple Montessori Schools expanding with 20+ locations in New Jersey, continuing 50+ year Montessori legacy. Evolved education approach offered to new students.
